26+ Years of Excellence
About Us

Where Learning Meets Excellence

★

New Brilliant High School (NBHS) has been a pillar of quality education in Hyderabad for over 26 years. Recognised by the Government of Telangana, we offer holistic education from Nursery to Class X across three thriving branches — empowering thousands of young minds to achieve their full potential.

  • Co-educational, English-medium State Board school
  • Attapur Ring Road, Pillar No: 137 & Hyderguda, Near Janapriya Utopia
  • Classes from Nursery to Class X (School Code: 36230401908)
  • Ultra-modern Atal Tinkering Lab with STEM facilities
  • Transport facility available for all areas
  • Running 3 branches successfully with wonderful parent support
Govt. Recognised
State Board
Co-Ed
English Medium
Age 3+
Why Choose NBHS

Distinctive Features of NBHS

★

We go beyond textbooks to nurture well-rounded, future-ready individuals through our unique educational philosophy.

01
Inspiring Faculty
Dedicated teachers committed to nurturing young minds with passion, patience, and expertise in their subjects.
02
English-Immersive Environment
A fully English-medium atmosphere that prepares students for global communication and academic excellence.
03
Innovative Methods
Cutting-edge teaching approaches that shape and elevate academic standards through creative learning strategies.
04
Aptitude Assessment
Personalized learning journeys designed through individual aptitude testing and continuous feedback mechanisms.
05
Computer Literacy
Basic computer literacy integrated seamlessly into the curriculum, preparing students for the digital age.
06
Enriching Competitions
Diverse extracurricular competitions that enrich learning experiences and build confidence and teamwork skills.
07
Personalized Support
Inclusive support for all learners, including visual and auditory aids ensuring no child is left behind.
08
No External Tuition Needed
Comprehensive in-school education eliminating the need for external tuition — complete learning within campus.
Innovation Hub

Atal Tinkering Lab

★

Our ultra-modern tinkering lab sparks curiosity, creativity and scientific temperament in young innovators.

 Lab Technologies
Robotics
Aerospace Drone Technology
Remote IoT Sensing
3D Printing
Bio Matrics & Bio Technology
Miniaturized Electronics
  Infrastructure
Branded Furniture & World Class Workstations
World Class Tinkering Stations
Advanced Prototyping Equipment
Space Age Seamless Learning Environment
Digital Amphitheatre for Presentations

What Parents Say

Voices of Our Brilliant Community

★
★★★★★

"I was a student of this school for almost 13 years from Nursery to SSC. Even after a decade, I miss my school days, my friends and my teachers. Proud to be a Brilliant student! #Brilliantian"

A
Alumni, 2013 Batch SSC Graduate · NBHS Attapur
★★★★★

"The teachers at NBHS take exceptional care of students, particularly in education. The environment is nurturing and the teaching methods are truly innovative. My child has grown tremendously here."

P
Parent — Priya R. Parent of Class VII Student
★★★★☆

"The English-immersive environment has made my child confident in communication. The Atal Tinkering Lab is fantastic — my son loves the robotics sessions. Best decision we made for his education."

R
Parent — Raju M. Parent of Class IX Student
★★★★★

"What sets NBHS apart is their commitment to comprehensive education. My daughter never needs external tuition — everything is covered in school. The teachers are dedicated and approachable."
